caption: A man wearing a green short-sleeved button-down shirt over a patterned white and black garment stands in an outdoor setting. To his left, another person is partially visible. Overlaid on the left side of the screen is a "SUBSCRIBE" button graphic with a bell icon. The word "SUBSCRIBED" is highlighted in a white box, while "SUBSCRIBE" appears in a faded pink font both above and below this box. The website address "www.plustvafrica.com" is visible at the top left of the screen, and three small circles are positioned on the right side. As the scene progresses, a white mouse cursor enters the frame from the bottom and moves upward, eventually clicking on the bell icon next to the "SUBSCRIBED" text. The background and the people remain stationary throughout the sequence while the cursor interacts with the on-screen graphics.
